Şeyma Öztürk graduated from İstanbul Üniversitesi Hukuk Fakültesi (Istanbul University Faculty of Law) in 2018. She completed her legal internship at the Istanbul Bar Association in 2019.

She is currently pursuing her master's degree in the Private Law Department at the İstanbul Üniversitesi Sosyal Bilimler Enstitüsü (Istanbul University Institute of Social Sciences) and is working as a research assistant at the Istanbul 29 Mayıs University Faculty of Law.
